title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: leapp-repository bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for leapp-repository is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Repositories for leappBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Inhibited upgrade because of Intel i5-1250PE CPU (JIRA:RHEL-53801)  Traceback in target_userspace_creator (JIRA:RHEL-77945)  Leapp upgrade from RHEL 8.10 to RHEL 9.x fails when Valgrind packages are installed (JIRA:RHEL-84978)  Leapp module.py library does not read the DNF config (JIRA:RHEL-39095)  Azure Gen1 VMs upgraded from RHEL 7 > RHEL 8 > RHEL 9 fail to boot (JIRA:RHEL-38255)  Getting "Error: GPG check FAILED" while performing leapp upgrade (JIRA:RHEL-47472)  Missing checks for (in)correct target version format (JIRA:RHEL-96238)  Create a Leapp actor for MySQL for RHEL 8->9 migration (JIRA:RHEL-5459)  Leapp fails while running "su - -c update-ca-trust" exit code 127 with fapolicy enabled [rhel-8] (JIRA:RHEL-65599)  Rebase leapp-repository to v0.23.0 (rhel-8.10) (JIRA:RHEL-67627)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Leapp upgrade from RHEL 8.10 to RHEL 9.x fails when Valgrind packages are installed
Leapp module.py library does not read the DNF config
Azure Gen1 VMs upgraded from RHEL 7 > RHEL 8 > RHEL 9 fail to boot
Missing checks for (in)correct target version format
Create a Leapp actor for MySQL for RHEL 8->9 migration
Leapp fails while running "su - -c update-ca-trust" exit code 127 with fapolicy enabled [rhel-8]

full_text:
An update for leapp-repository is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Repositories for leappBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Inhibited upgrade because of Intel i5-1250PE CPU (JIRA:RHEL-53801)  Traceback in target_userspace_creator (JIRA:RHEL-77945)  Leapp upgrade from RHEL 8.10 to RHEL 9.x fails when Valgrind packages are installed (JIRA:RHEL-84978)  Leapp module.py library does not read the DNF config (JIRA:RHEL-39095)  Azure Gen1 VMs upgraded from RHEL 7 > RHEL 8 > RHEL 9 fail to boot (JIRA:RHEL-38255)  Getting "Error: GPG check FAILED" while performing leapp upgrade (JIRA:RHEL-47472)  Missing checks for (in)correct target version format (JIRA:RHEL-96238)  Create a Leapp actor for MySQL for RHEL 8->9 migration (JIRA:RHEL-5459)  Leapp fails while running "su - -c update-ca-trust" exit code 127 with fapolicy enabled [rhel-8] (JIRA:RHEL-65599)  Rebase leapp-repository to v0.23.0 (rhel-8.10) (JIRA:RHEL-67627)
